sentence: Beafloaf before the loreraining starts or drown standing still.

wombos.definition: To be extremely lowkey — to dial back one's energy, volume, or presence to the fullest possible degree.
wombos.example: I told him to beafloaf during the movie, but he just kept talking.

wombos.definition: Lore pouring down on you whether you asked for it or not — the meteorological form of being loreained.
wombos.example: Stepped into the group chat and it started loreraining immediately.
